# Alert

Alert notifications for displaying contextual feedback messages to users, such as success confirmations, warnings, errors, and informational notices.

## Import

```jsx
import { Alert } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `"info" \| "warning" \| "success" \| "error"` | `"info"` | The status of the alert, which determines its color and icon. |
| `variant` | `"subtle" \| "solid" \| "outline"` | `"subtle"` | The visual style variant of the alert. |
| `title` | `string` | - | The title text displayed in the alert. |
| `icon` | `ReactNode` | - | Custom icon to display. If not provided, a default icon based on `status` is used. |

## Usage

### Basic Alert

```jsx
<Alert status="info" title="New update available" />
```

### Alert with Variants

```jsx
<Alert status="success" variant="subtle" title="Profile updated successfully" />
<Alert status="error" variant="solid" title="Something went wrong" />
<Alert status="warning" variant="outline" title="Your session is about to expire" />
```

### Alert with Custom Icon

```jsx
import { LuRocket } from "react-icons/lu";

<Alert status="info" title="Launching soon" icon={<LuRocket />} />
```
